title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, discusses the "magic cycle" from research breakthrough to real-world impact. The conversation covers AI tools for scientific discovery, including Co-Scientist and ERA, alongside technical advances like speculative decoding, generative UI, flood forecasting, and the Willow quantum chip.
writeup: Yossi Matias, Vice President and Head of Google Research, describes a "magic cycle" in which research discoveries translate into real-world impact. The discussion spans AI applications including flood forecasting, MedGemma, and Gemini for Science, and emerging areas like quantum computing with the Willow chip. Concepts touched include speculative decoding, generative AI, and test-time compute, framing how Google's research moves from foundational work to deployed products.
